inline_comments.message: let's set the "v8" to "v11" I think that's what we are going to be using.  May need to change the invoked url in the junits in some other places

You can have a setUp method annotated with @BeforeClass and another one tearDown with @AfterClass.   The @BeforeClass you will call only once the Util.buildAaiSim() and in the @AfterClass the HttpServletServer.factory.destroy().   This will avoid some race conditions running junits with ports opening and shutting down.   Sometimes in jenkins environment, it happens, I think it may save some headaches down the line.
